title: John Cena Mace
description: Simply replaces the smash sounds of the mace to that of the classic John Cena meme.
body:
This resource pack requires the latest snapshot 24w11a, as it replaces the mace sounds with a classic meme you likely know from years ago. :)

*snrk* this one speaks for itself

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qntdmyArdwk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
